claim: ''.join(chr(c) for c in codes) with tracked int-list resolves correctly -- threshold: 0% false-negative rate

root_causes.description: _collect_int_lists_from_body does not recurse into control flow (if/for/while/with/try), unlike _walk_body in symbol table helpers
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Add recursive traversal of control flow bodies in _collect_int_lists_from_body, mirroring _recurse_control_flow logic

root_causes.description: _collect_int_list_assigns only descends 1 level (FunctionDef, ClassDef->method). Nested function-in-function, class-in-function are blind
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Use recursive ast.walk or iterative descent like the scope_map builder

root_causes.description: _extract_int_list requires ast.Constant but expressions like 100+1 are ast.BinOp
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Evaluate simple arithmetic BinOp nodes (Add, Sub, Mult, BitXor, etc.) to int constants

root_causes.description: Augmented assignment (+=), .extend(), .append() not tracked by int-list pre-pass
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Track AugAssign with ast.Add when base is already tracked and RHS is int-list

root_causes.description: Int-list pre-pass does not follow Name=Name aliasing chains
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Add indirection resolution similar to _Ref chain following in symbol table

root_causes.description: _resolve_comprehension_chr requires elt.func.id == 'chr' -- any aliasing of chr evades
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Check alias_map for chr aliases, handle builtins.chr attribute access

root_causes.description: _resolve_map_join does not look up tracked int-list vars as second arg
root_causes.fix_suggestion: Thread int_list_table into _resolve_map_join and resolve Name args
